quote: ‘Unbroken’ doesn’t mean untouched. It means the breaking stopped with us.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
Healing is not about being untouched; it’s about recognizing our scars and choosing to stop the cycle of pain. Together, we can build a legacy of resilience and strength for future generations.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken

#Healing #Resilience #Family #Legacy
